summary_en: 5,200,000 shares (2.04% of shares outstanding) up to ¥12.0B. Acquisition period May 15–Aug 31, 2026. Methods: ToSTNeT-3 (自己株式立会外買付取引) and open-market purchase on TSE. All acquired shares to be cancelled Sept 30, 2026.
title_en: Notice of Determination of Matters Concerning Treasury Share Acquisition and Cancellation of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief: Nippon Television Holdings' board resolved on May 14, 2026 to acquire up to 5,200,000 treasury shares (2.04% of outstanding shares) at a cost not exceeding ¥12.0 billion. The acquisition window runs from May 15 to August 31, 2026, using two methods: ToSTNeT-3 off-exchange transactions (自己株式立会外買付取引) and open-market purchases on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. All acquired shares will be cancelled on September 30, 2026. The company cited shareholder return enhancement and capital efficiency improvement as rationale, aligned with its 2025–2027 Medium-Term Management Plan, which targets a sustained, stable shareholder return policy with a payout ratio of 35% or higher.
